channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: One of the worst Resident Evil games could be getting another re-release according to new ESRB rating
item.description: Resident Evil 6, specifically, could be getting a current-generation release according to a new ESRB rating.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: UK businesses are paving the way for AI adoption
item.description: British companies will invest more than their global counterparts in AI, GenAI, cloud and data in 2025.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Las empresas son más conscientes de la huella medioambiental de la IA generativa, pero tienen problemas para abordarla
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) generativa tiene un creciente y significativo impacto negativo en el medioambiente. A pesar de ello, muchas organizaciones no están haciendo un seguimiento adecuado de la huella que generan, lo que está poniendo en peligro sus objetivos ESG.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: En marcha QDQ-GEO: el primer sistema geoestacionario de distribución de clave cuántica por satélite
item.description: Un paso adelante en materia de seguridad cuántica e innovación tecnológica para el sector aeroespacial.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Sony’s surprising entry into electric vehicle market
item.description: Sony and Honda's Afeela 1 EV launches with advanced tech and entertainment for $89,900. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson gives his takeaways.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI can predict career success from a facial image, study finds
item.description: A new study by researchers from four universities claims artificial intelligence (AI) models can predict career and educational success from a single image of a person’s face.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Transforme su Oficina de Gestión de Proyectos en un motor estratégico
item.description: Hoy en día, muchas Project Management Office (Oficina de Gestión de Proyectos; de ahora en adelante PMO, por sus siglas en inglés) están atrapadas en un enfoque anticuado y teórico de la gestión de proyectos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The AI security tsunami
item.description: AI isn‘t just changing cloud computing, it’s completely reshaping how we think about security in the cloud—on both sides. Attackers use AI to cause breaches, and enterprises use AI to defend against such attacks. Let me break this down into what‘s happening and what enterprises need to do about it.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump, a populist president, is flanked by tech billionaires at his inauguration
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Some of the most exclusive seats at President Donald Trump’s inauguration on Monday were reserved for powerful tech CEOs who also happen to be among the world’s richest men.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump orders government not to infringe on Americans’ speech, calls for censorship investigation
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump on Monday ordered that no federal officer, employee or agent may unconstitutionally abridge the free speech of any American citizen, an early step toward his campaign promise to dismantle what he called government “censorship” of U.S. citizens.
item.dc:creator: ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Elon Musk's prominence during inauguration ceremonies stamps tech titan's place in Trump's orbit
item.description: The blossoming relationship between President Donald Trump and tech titan Elon Musk was on full display throughout Monday's inauguration ceremonies.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Beaumont, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Want to add 4TB storage, an SD card slot and USB-A ports to the Apple Mac Mini M4 Mini PC? Satechi has a surprisingly simple solution for you
item.description: Satechi's Mac Mini M4 Stand & Hub offers up to 4TB SSD storage, legacy USB-A ports, sleek aluminum design, and efficient cooling for optimal performance.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: 5 hot network trends for 2025
item.description: Networking has been a relatively stable industry for decades. On the vendor side of the equation, it’s been Cisco versus everyone else. On the tech side, a slow, steady progression of incrementally faster versions of tried-and-true standards like Wi-Fi and Ethernet was the norm.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Only Murders in the Building season 5: everything we know so far about the show's return to Hulu and Disney Plus
item.description: Charles, Mabel, and Oliver will return to solve more mysterious deaths in Only Murders in the Building season 5 – here's everything you need to know.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Jeff Bezos, Lauren Sanchez, Elon Musk and Ivanka Trump partied like oligarchs
item.description: Ivanka Trump and Jared Kushner exchanged greetings with Jeff Bezos, Lauren Sanchez and Elon Musk at the candlelight dinner for Donald Trump at the National Building Museum Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Tech leaders stand together at Trump inauguration in Capitol Rotunda
item.description: Some of the country's leading technology leaders are together at the Capitol Rotunda for President-elect Trump's inauguration as the industry gets closer to the incoming leader's orbit.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Everything new on Hulu in February 2025
item.description: A new month calls for another list of new Hulu movies and shows. Here are all the new titles coming to Hulu in February 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: How to stop robocalls on your flip phone
item.description: Flip phones are harder to block spam calls from, but it's not impossible. Kurt the "CyberGuy" explains how to stop incoming robocalls on your flip phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: TikTok goes dark as US ban takes effect
item.description: Millions of TikTok users in the United States are no longer able to watch videos on the social media platform as a federal ban on the immensely popular app takes effect.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: For TikTok users, mourning, frustration and clinging to hope as TikTok ban looms
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The U.S. is inching closer and closer to a potential TikTok ban — with the nation's highest court upholding a law that's set to halt new downloads of the app starting Sunday.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: JDK 24: The new features in Java 24
item.description: Java Development Kit (JDK) 24 is now in a second rampdown phase, with the feature set frozen at 24 features, ranging from a class-file API to a fourth preview of structured concurrency.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Army readies new AI guidance based on lessons learned
item.description: The Army is looking at commercial AI use cases that can serve large populations of users, ideally without running up huge bills The post Army readies new AI guidance based on lessons learned first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jared Serbu, Federal News Network

item.title: TikTok refugees are pouring to Xiaohongshu. Here's what you need to know about the RedNote app
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the fate of TikTok hangs in the balance, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, also called RedNote – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FU TING and DAVID COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Who could buy TikTok? Only a few parties are serious about offering
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The supremely popular TikTok could be banned on Jan. 19 under a federal law that forces the video sharing platform to divest itself from its China-based parent company, ByteDance, or shut down its U.S. operations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: How to save your TikTok videos, data ahead of looming ban
item.description: Barring a last-minute turnaround, the popular social media app will be unavailable in all 50 states Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Makers of autonomous vehicles want to change the world—but first they want to change regulations
item.description: When a truck breaks down, its driver knows what to do. They pull over to the side of the road, put on their hazard warning lights, and lay out safety triangles to warn other drivers about the risk of the parked vehicle.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Noem calls for ‘smaller, more nimble’ CISA during nomination hearing
item.description: South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem, Trump's pick to lead DHS, criticized CISA's work on misinformation and said the agency "has gotten far off mission." The post Noem calls for ‘smaller, more nimble’ CISA during nomination hearing first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Bitcoin soars past $100,000 ahead of possible early action on crypto by Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The price of bitcoin topped $100,000 again early Friday as a pumped up cryptocurrency industry expects early action by Donald Trump when he's sworn in as president next week.
item.dc:creator: ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chinese tech firm shares robot training secrets with the world
item.description: A pioneering artificial intelligence and robotics company from China has developed a repository of over 1 million robotic movements to provide robotic training.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
